summary: 274 tests collected: 257 passed, 11 failed, 6 skipped. All 11 failures are concentrated in tests/test_example_tools.py and stem from missing top-level imports of `simpleeval` and `httpx` inside tinyagent.py — both modules are declared as runtime dependencies in pyproject.toml, so this is an actual source bug (the example tools reference names that are never bound), not a dependency issue.

failures.summary: NameError: name 'simpleeval' is not defined (raised at tinyagent.py:820 in _eval_arithmetic when constructing simpleeval.SimpleEval(), and again at tinyagent.py:884 when referencing simpleeval.FunctionNotDefined)
failures.root_cause: actual bug: tinyagent.py uses `simpleeval` in module-scope helper code but never imports the module at runtime (dependency is declared in pyproject.toml but not imported)
